data.title: Fiona‘s daily news-10.25, 2023News：1-DTCC 上出现BTC  ETF代码再消失再出现，BTC从31k上涨到34k
data.text: Fiona‘s daily news-10.25, 2023News：1-DTCC 上出现BTC  ETF代码再消失再出现，BTC从31k上涨到34k。截至本推发出前查了下又出现了。个人感觉这不再是一个点无需过度关注DTCC官网： https://www.dtcc.com/products/cs/exchange_traded_funds_plain_new.php倪大科普DTCC：https://x.com/Phyrex_Ni/status/1716540970270097814?s=202-11.6 OPEN AI 大会，AI标的活跃：WLD，AGIX，FET3-PEPE销毁5.5m代币后，价格暴涨4-Galaxy Research reports that Bitcoin ETF inflows are expected to reach $14 billion in the first year after the launch of the Bitcoin spot ETF, rising to $27 billion in the second year and $39 billion in the third year.5-FTX和潜在买家洽谈重启可能性：https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2023-10-24/ftx-is-negotiating-with-three-bidders-to-restart-crypto-exchange6-Celestia很快启动Mainnet Beta行情资讯：1.近日强推三大币走的基本都不错：LINK，TRB， INJ，今天TRB尤其强。继续看好ing2.群友推荐POWR PK3R 虽说回调买入，但是强到没有回调3.dydx解锁在即，价格突破箱体区间4.群车Banana，RLB做多绕过买卖税链上信息：1.ETH做空地址追踪 https://watcher.synthetix.io/0x586db03b0bb5b8dfd7378efeac19339706eabe642.FTX-related addresses transferred more than $10.49 million in cryptocurrency to Wintermute's Binance and Coinbase deposit addresses in the past 8 hours, including 2,904 ETH ($5.18 million), 1,341 MKR ($2.02 million), 198,000 LINK (  2.26 million US dollars), 12,000 AAVE (1.03 million US dollars)https://platform.arkhamintelligence.com/explorer/address/0xde9A61c2b776e2F4C6ddB0C9Ad5cCfCfC15B0a9B
data.content:
Fiona‘s daily news-10.25, 2023

News：
1-DTCC 上出现BTC ETF代码再消失再出现，BTC从31k上涨到34k。截至本推发出前查了下又出现了。个人感觉这不再是一个点无需过度关注
DTCC官网： https://www.dtcc.com/products/cs/exchange_traded_funds_plain_new.php
倪大科普DTCC：https://x.com/Phyrex_Ni/status/1716540970270097814?s=20

2-11.6 OPEN AI 大会，AI标的活跃：WLD，AGIX，FET

3-PEPE销毁5.5m代币后，价格暴涨

4-Galaxy Research reports that Bitcoin ETF inflows are expected to reach $14 billion in the first year after the launch of the Bitcoin spot ETF, rising to $27 billion in the second year and $39 billion in the third year.

5-FTX和潜在买家洽谈重启可能性：https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2023-10-24/ftx-is-negotiating-with-three-bidders-to-restart-crypto-exchange

6-Celestia很快启动Mainnet Beta

行情资讯：
1.近日强推三大币走的基本都不错：LINK，TRB， INJ，今天TRB尤其强。继续看好ing
2.群友推荐POWR PK3R 虽说回调买入，但是强到没有回调
3.dydx解锁在即，价格突破箱体区间
4.群车Banana，RLB做多绕过买卖税


链上信息：
1.ETH做空地址追踪 https://watcher.synthetix.io/0x586db03b0bb5b8dfd7378efeac19339706eabe64

2.FTX-related addresses transferred more than $10.49 million in cryptocurrency to Wintermute's Binance and Coinbase deposit addresses in the past 8 hours, including 2,904 ETH ($5.18 million), 1,341 MKR ($2.02 million), 198,000 LINK ( 2.26 million US dollars), 12,000 AAVE (1.03 million US dollars)
https://platform.arkhamintelligence.com/explorer/address/0xde9A61c2b776e2F4C6ddB0C9Ad5cCfCfC15B0a9B
X (formerly Twitter)
Phyrex on X
得，在解释得细致一点，所谓得DTCC是一家存款信托与清算公司，负责纳斯达克交易清算。并不是代表iShares也就是贝莱德就已经登录了 #Bitcoin 的现货ETF，这只是准备流程中的一部分，我们打个比方。…

data.title: 1.WLD更改做市商还币时间，大部分延迟到12月15号
data.text: 1.WLD更改做市商还币时间，大部分延迟到12月15号。https://x.com/embercn/status/1716274130151235737?s=46&t=UDvWFnnR-rFcApu1t6pAvg2.ftx债券频频上涨，目前常在出现半价买盘。相关标的 $FTT3.关注强势币种 link INJ trb4.dwf Andrei暗示拉盘币，竞猜时间https://x.com/ag_dwf/status/1716331811649798311?s=46&t=UDvWFnnR-rFcApu1t6pAvg5.Zksync 上的正经项目 GRVT，可以交互起来别偷懒。6.看交易量明显有资金流入，现在不做空。7.Top 50 chains up at least 15% on the weekly include Pulse Chain (#13), Aptos (#25), Sui (#28), Mantle (#32), and Kujira (#36).
data.content:
1.WLD更改做市商还币时间，大部分延迟到12月15号。https://x.com/embercn/status/1716274130151235737?s=46&t=UDvWFnnR-rFcApu1t6pAvg

2.ftx债券频频上涨，目前常在出现半价买盘。相关标的 $FTT

3.关注强势币种 link INJ trb

4.dwf Andrei暗示拉盘币，竞猜时间
https://x.com/ag_dwf/status/1716331811649798311?s=46&t=UDvWFnnR-rFcApu1t6pAvg

5.Zksync 上的正经项目 GRVT，可以交互起来别偷懒。

6.看交易量明显有资金流入，现在不做空。

7.Top 50 chains up at least 15% on the weekly include Pulse Chain (#13), Aptos (#25), Sui (#28), Mantle (#32), and Kujira (#36).
X (formerly Twitter)
余烬 (@EmberCN) on X
Worldcoin 已更改做市商还币规则：

原定 10/24 需归还的 1 亿 WLD 减少为 2500 万，另外的 7500 万 WLD 延期至 12/15 归还。

Worldcoin 官方公告：
https://t.co/SQj2MEwxX4
